name: cep_exists_flush_link_gate
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-152: the fire-loop eval runs only when the RuleAgendaItem got QUEUED — witnesses alone (join empty) never link the segment, so the IF sits staged across epochs; and a MARKED-expired witness keeps counting/blocking until its quiescence retract. E1a/E1b initial, advance past both deadlines (registered, marked), then [P1,E1c(due-on-arrival),P2]: P1's staging links the segment; the fire-loop drains [P2] and the IF blocks on the MARKED E1a: reverse([P1,P2]) = [2,1] fire transiently; quiescence retracts all. Graft: BfDump ex990x32 ep3 ([46] blocked{()*} on the marked witness).
